source: U.S. Energy Information Administration open data/API

CRUDE_STOCKS.label: U.S. commercial crude oil stocks excluding SPR
CRUDE_STOCKS.interpretation: EIA inventory draw: lower visible supply is supportive for the related energy market.

CUSHING_STOCKS.label: Cushing, Oklahoma crude oil stocks
CUSHING_STOCKS.interpretation: EIA inventory build: higher visible supply pressures the related energy market.

GASOLINE_STOCKS.label: U.S. motor gasoline stocks
GASOLINE_STOCKS.interpretation: EIA series returned only one usable observation, so weekly inventory change could not be scored.

DISTILLATE_STOCKS.label: U.S. distillate fuel oil stocks
DISTILLATE_STOCKS.interpretation: EIA series returned only one usable observation, so weekly inventory change could not be scored.

REFINERY_UTILIZATION.label: U.S. refinery utilization rate
REFINERY_UTILIZATION.interpretation: EIA demand/utilization change was small, so the signal is neutral.

CRUDE_PRODUCTION.label: U.S. field production of crude oil
CRUDE_PRODUCTION.interpretation: EIA supply change was small, so the physical-balance signal is neutral.

CRUDE_IMPORTS.label: U.S. crude oil imports
CRUDE_IMPORTS.interpretation: EIA supply decline: lower visible supply supports the related energy market.

CRUDE_EXPORTS.label: U.S. crude oil exports
CRUDE_EXPORTS.interpretation: EIA demand/utilization decline: weaker throughput or product demand pressures the related energy market.

GASOLINE_PRODUCT_SUPPLIED.label: U.S. finished motor gasoline product supplied
GASOLINE_PRODUCT_SUPPLIED.interpretation: EIA demand/utilization increase: stronger throughput or product demand supports the related energy market.

DISTILLATE_PRODUCT_SUPPLIED.label: U.S. distillate fuel oil product supplied
DISTILLATE_PRODUCT_SUPPLIED.interpretation: EIA demand/utilization change was small, so the signal is neutral.

NATGAS_STORAGE.label: Lower 48 working natural gas in underground storage
NATGAS_STORAGE.interpretation: Natural gas storage is above the five-year average; larger supply cushion pressures natural gas.
